name: Arthur
bio:
Came to the Eerland Continent by chance. To return to his own world, he helps Kuroko search for the Sand of Time.

Role: Group Control
Specialty: A mid-backline Blitz-type hero with considerable AOE damage output and strong Control; any target bound by the Heavenly Silk [Restraint] takes extra True Damage.

skillSlots.name: Sacred Trace Cleanse
skillSlots.description: Attacks highest-ATK enemy for 300% ATK as P.DMG with 60% chance to apply [Bind].

skillSlots.name: Deliverance Granted
skillSlots.description: Attacks all enemies, dealing 160% P.DMG with a 40% chance to apply 1 stack of [Holy Seal].

effects.name: Power of Apocalypse
effects.description: 20% chance to apply [Bind] when actively Attack.

effects.name: Power of Apocalypse
effects.description: When an enemy's [Bind] is dispelled or expires, fires [Cross Dart] at Target and Arthur gains 1 stack of [Apocalypse].

effects.name: Power of Apocalypse
effects.description: Fires 1 [Cross Dart] at all [Bind]-affected enemies after casting [Sacred Trace Cleanse].

effects.name: Power of Apocalypse
effects.description: If ≤1 [Bind]-affected enemies remain after [Deliverance Granted], recasts once at 50% reduced DMG.
